title: Going from Data Specialist to DevSecOps — what nobody tells you
snippet: Security thinking is a different mindset. You stop asking 'Does it work?' and start asking 'Is it safe?' Every docker run flag, every IAM role, every third-party image has a security implication.

title: Stop using Kubernetes when Docker Compose would do the job
snippet: At my org I've seen engineers spin up full EKS clusters for apps serving 10 users a day. Here's a simple decision framework: use Compose for local dev + small apps, K8s only when you truly need auto-scaling and HA.
